# Project Direction

Rez2ANS Next is under active development. The project direction includes improving conversion quality, performance, usability, export workflows, documentation, and practical BBS integration.

Areas being explored include stronger image preparation, additional conversion controls, broader output support, better inspection tools, more profiles and examples, and continued Windows and Linux testing.

This is a direction, not a promise or a fixed schedule. Features and behavior can change as the application evolves.
